title: Bridge Essay: Neurophysiological Effects of Gayatri Mantra Meditation on Emotional Processing:

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

**Neurophysiological Effects of Gayatri Mantra Meditation on Emotional Processing: An EEG-ERP Study.**. Appl Psychophysiol Biofeedback.. PMID: 41428258. DOI: 10.1007/s10484-025-09753-7. This study has studied the impact of Gayatri Mantra (GM) meditation on emotional processing using event-related potentials (ERPs) and self-report measures. Twenty-four healthy male participants (M = 32.37, SD = 8.02 years) voluntarily participated in this study. Based on their self-reported daily routine practices, participants were categorized into two groups: meditation practitioners (n = 12) and non-practitioners (n = 12), who did not engage in any mind-body practices.
